name: page-header
title: Page Header
description: A page header with title, description, icon, and optional actions slot.

name: pagination
title: Pagination
description: URL-driven pagination with page numbers, navigation, and total count.

name: search-filter
title: Search Filter
description: A search input that syncs its value to URL search params.

name: select-filter
title: Select Filter
description: A select dropdown that syncs its value to URL search params.

name: button-group-filter
title: Button Group Filter
description: A button group that syncs the active value to URL search params.

name: date-range-filter
title: Date Range Filter
description: A date range picker with optional year navigation that syncs to URL params.

name: month-filter
title: Month Filter
description: A month/year selector with prev/next navigation that syncs to URL params.

name: metrics
title: Metrics
description: A responsive grid of metric cards with formatting helpers.

name: sheet-form
title: Sheet Form
description: Slide-over sheets for detail views and forms with sections.

name: navigation-tabs
title: Navigation Tabs
description: URL-driven tabs that navigate between routes.

name: json-tree
title: JSON Tree
description: A recursive, collapsible JSON viewer with syntax highlighting.
